overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment interior featuring neon lighting, a bar area, seating with couches, kitchen facilities, and vending machines. The player character moves through the industrial-style space examining objects and interacting with the environment before exiting through a green door into a hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living area with bar and seating

agents.ego_description: walking from the bar area toward the back seating area, observing the green doors and furniture

entered.detail: dark L-shaped bar with yellow neon trim and stools
metal bar stools with round seats lined along the counter
horizontal purple and white neon tubes mounted on the back wall
industrial ceiling fan with multiple blades hanging from exposed ceiling
pair of dark green metal doors with silver handles
tall metal rack with various items and clothing
light green upholstered sofa against the right wall
round glass coffee table with scattered papers and items

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment, starting near a neon-lit bar counter. The camera moves forward through the living space, revealing green metal doors at the far end, a metal shelving unit, and a green couch with a coffee table in the seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating area with couches and coffee table

events.description: camera pans left to examine the window with metal bars and bean bag chair

agents.ego_description: turning to examine the couches, coffee table with scattered debris, and the window with security bars

entered.detail: large silver metallic bean bag chair in the corner
window covered with metal security bars and frosted glass
screen displaying colorful advertisements on the wall
trash and papers strewn across the floor and furniture

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the seating area, turning to reveal a silver bean bag chair and a window with metal security bars. The wall-mounted TV displays glowing advertisements while scattered papers litter the round rug and coffee table. The green couch shifts from the right to the left of the frame as the camera turns.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen area with vending machines and counter

events.description: player interacts with kitchen counter triggering UI popup for 'BARGOGLASS 2020'

agents.ego_description: approaching the kitchen area and interacting with the counter to examine items and read digital displays

entered.detail: tall purple vending machine with digital interface and yellow stripe
front-loading washing machine next to the vending unit
stainless steel counter with pizza box and cooking utensils
open pizza box with remaining slices on the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the kitchen area, revealing a distinctive purple vending machine and washing machine against the wall. The player approaches the kitchen counter where a pizza box sits open, and interacts with the environment triggering a UI popup. The floor transitions from carpet to tile in this utilitarian space.

agents.ego_description: moving back from the kitchen counter toward the bar area, examining the delivery boxes and hanging signage

entered.detail: white cardboard box with red 'AU' logo sitting on the bar
circular orange and red pendant light resembling a burger
illuminated menu display above the bar counter

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the kitchen, the camera returns to the central bar area where a white delivery box with 'AU' branding sits on the counter. A distinctive burger-shaped pendant light hangs from the ceiling. The bar counter moves to the center of the frame as the player explores the transition between kitchen and living spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment exit area with green door

events.description: player opens green exit door revealing a hallway with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit door and opening it to reveal the hallway beyond

entered.detail: green metal exit door with illuminated light above the frame
metal rack with hanging white coat and storage boxes
stacked boxes and storage containers near the exit
corridor visible through the opening door with blue vending machine

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the apartment's exit, featuring a green metal door with an illuminated sign above it. A coat rack and cardboard boxes sit to the right. At the end of the segment, the door opens to reveal a hallway with a blue vending machine visible in the corridor beyond, marking the transition from the private apartment to the public hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment that transitions from a cozy, neon-accented living space into a utilitarian kitchen before exiting into a public corridor. It begins near a neon-lit bar counter, moving forward past a green couch and metal shelving toward a seating area where a silver bean bag chair and a barred window are visible under the glow of wall-mounted advertisements. As the camera pivots, the floor shifts from a round rug to cold tiles, leading the viewer into a kitchen area featuring a purple vending machine and an open pizza box on the counter. The movement then circles back through the central living space, passing under a burger-shaped pendant light and a branded delivery box, before turning toward the apartment's exit. Finally, the camera approaches a green metal door flanked by a coat rack and cardboard boxes, opening it to reveal a blue vending machine in the dimly lit hallway beyond.
